description: Art teacher in Xi'an. Loves calligraphy, tea, and historical sites.

voice_lines.family: 我非常重视家人之间的联系。
voice_lines.work: 我是美术老师，在西安一所中学已经教了八年了。
voice_lines.travel: 我喜欢去有历史文化的地方旅行。
voice_lines.food: 我比较喜欢清淡的食物。

discoverable_facts.identity: 美玲这个名字是我妈妈取的，她很喜欢梅花，所以取了'美'字。
discoverable_facts.family: 我和父母住在同一个小区，每天都能见面，感情很好。
discoverable_facts.place_from: 我是西安人，从小在那里长大。西安有很多有名的小吃，凉皮和肉夹馍是我从小吃到大的味道。
discoverable_facts.family_size: 我家就三口人——我和爸妈。
discoverable_facts.family_siblings: 我是独生女，没有兄弟姐妹。
discoverable_facts.family_live: 我和父母住在同一个小区，每天都能见面，感情很好。
discoverable_facts.work: 我在西安一所中学教书，教的是初中美术，已经教了八年了。
discoverable_facts.hobby: 我练书法有十几年了，写的是楷书，最喜欢欧体的风格。
discoverable_facts.travel_where: 我去过北京和苏州，最喜欢苏州的园林，感觉非常有诗意。
discoverable_facts.travel: 我去过北京、苏州、成都，最喜欢苏州的园林，感觉非常有诗意。
discoverable_facts.place: 西安有很多历史遗迹，兵马俑、大雁塔都在我家附近，我觉得住在这里很自豪。
discoverable_facts.food: 我最喜欢西安的凉皮和肉夹馍，这是我从小吃到大的味道。
discoverable_facts.work_company: 我在西安市内一所公立中学教美术，是正式编制的老师，已经在那个学校教了八年了。
discoverable_facts.work_origin: 从小喜欢画画，大学就选了美术教育，毕业后进了学校，感觉是很自然的选择。
discoverable_facts.hobby_best: 书法最好的时候是进入那种完全专注的状态，外面什么声音都听不到，只有笔和纸。
discoverable_facts.hobby_origin: 初中的时候老师书法写得特别好，我很佩服，就开始跟他练，一练就迷上了。
discoverable_facts.travel_with: 一般跟朋友或者家人一起，喜欢和人分享看到的历史古迹，自己去感觉少了点意思。

discoverable_facts_simple_en.travel: I've been to Beijing and Suzhou.

discoverable_facts_en.identity: My mum chose the name Meiling for me.
discoverable_facts_en.family: I live in the same compound as my parents.
discoverable_facts_en.place_from: I'm from Xi'an — I grew up there. Xi'an is famous for its street food; cold noodles and pork burgers are what I've eaten since childhood.
discoverable_facts_en.family_size: Just the three of us — me and my parents.
discoverable_facts_en.family_siblings: I'm an only child — no brothers or sisters.
discoverable_facts_en.family_live: I live in the same compound as my parents, so we see each other every day.
discoverable_facts_en.work: I teach at a middle school in Xi'an.
discoverable_facts_en.work_company: I teach at a public middle school in Xi'an — permanent staff position, been at that school for eight years.
discoverable_facts_en.work_origin: I loved drawing as a child, studied art education at university, and went into teaching after graduating — it felt like the natural path.
discoverable_facts_en.hobby: I've been practising calligraphy for over ten years.
discoverable_facts_en.hobby_best: Calligraphy at its best is total focus — the outside world disappears, just the brush and paper.
discoverable_facts_en.hobby_origin: My middle school teacher had exceptional calligraphy — I started practising with him and got completely hooked.
discoverable_facts_en.travel_where: I've been to Beijing and Suzhou — Suzhou's classical gardens are my favourite, very poetic.
discoverable_facts_en.travel_with: Usually with friends or family — I love sharing what I discover at historical sites. Alone feels a bit less meaningful.
discoverable_facts_en.food: My favourites are Xi'an cold noodles and pork burgers.

voice_lines_en.family: I place great importance on staying connected with family.
voice_lines_en.work: I'm an art teacher — I've been teaching at a middle school in Xi'an for eight years.
voice_lines_en.hobby: I enjoy practising calligraphy and drinking tea.
voice_lines_en.travel: I love travelling to places with history and culture.

distance_profile.zh: 西安离北京不算太远，坐高铁大概四个多小时。
distance_profile.en: Xi'an isn't too far from Beijing — about four hours by high-speed rail.
